title: (Set of 10 Classic Design 4 x 6 Inches Photo Frame Glass Front Window Black Colour Frame Sleek Design Amazing Collection Of Small Picture For Home Office (Wall Hanging & Tabletop)
features: FRAME DESCRIPTION – Set of 10, Freestanding and Wall Mountable. Classic 4 x 6” Inch black photo frame fitted with Glass window. A stylish, thin photo frame with a delicate grain texture.
SOLID PATTERN – This photo frame features a durable solid wood-effect finish with a sleek black coating, offering a clean and modern look that suits any décor.

PREMIUM DURABLE MATERIAL - The 4 x 6” Inch (10cm x 15cm) photo frame is made from excellent quality MDF material and fitted with a Glass window. The Glass window front of the art certificate photo frame preserves your photo by offering protection from scratches, dents, fading, and other damages.

EASY TO USE- The family picture frames keep your pictures in a good shape for years. The cardboard backer can let you load and change the pictures very easily. The wall hanging frame set forms a beautiful photo wall.

WALL MOUNT ALSO FOR TABLE TOP - This 4 x 6” Inch picture frames has sturdy hangers in the back for vertical and horizontal wall hanging or an easel stand for tabletop or desktop display. Versatile kickstand easel lets you display on desktop and table top, for your home and office.

IDEAL GIFT- Clean lines and minimalist design make them look tasteful. These photo frames are not only exquisite decoration in your home or office, but also perfect gift for Christmas, Thanksgiving, Birthday, Anniversary, Mother's Day, Father's Day.
